nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Father
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: nickname from Middle English fader, father, feder, fether (Old English fæder) ‘father’, often used to denote someone who exercised protecting care like that of a father. Some examples may belong at (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Fader (Old Danish Fathir, Old Swedish Fadhir). Some early bearers may belong with (1).

variants.name: Feather
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the hardy, brightly coloured plant (Middle English hather; the spelling was altered in the 18th century as a result of folk etymological association with heath). The name was first used in the late 19th century and became particularly popular from the mid-1940s.

variants.name: Fathers
meanings: English: variant of Father with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

en.lifeSummary: Father Morgan was born in 1155, in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom as the son of Morgan. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs. Father Morgan. He died in his hometown.

ko.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Father Morgan(은)는 1155년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에서 Morgan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Father Morgan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.
